2604.06900.title: SentinelSphere: Integrating AI-Powered Real-Time Threat Detection with Cybersecurity Awareness Training
2604.06900.paper_summary: The field of cybersecurity is confronted with two interrelated challenges: a worldwide deficit of qualified practitioners and ongoing human-factor weaknesses that account for the bulk of security incidents. To tackle these issues, we present SentinelSphere, a platform driven by artificial intelligence that unifies machine learning-based threat identification with security training powered by a Large Language Model (LLM). The detection module uses an Enhanced Deep Neural Network (DNN) trained on the CIC-IDS2017 and CIC-DDoS2019 benchmark datasets, enriched with novel HTTP-layer feature engineering that captures application level attack signatures. For the educational component, we deploy a quantised variant of Phi-4 model (Q4_K_M), fine-tuned for the cybersecurity domain, enabling deployment on commodity hardware requiring only 16 GB of RAM without dedicated GPU resources. Experimental results show that the Enhanced DNN attains high detection accuracy while substantially lowering false positives relative to baseline models, and maintains strong recall across critical attack categories such as DDoS, brute force, and web-based exploits. Validation workshops involving industry professionals and university students confirmed that the Traffic Light visualisation system and conversational AI assistant are both intuitive and effective for users without technical backgrounds. SentinelSphere illustrates that coupling intelligent threat detection with adaptive, LLM-driven security education can meaningfully address both technical and human-factor cybersecurity vulnerabilities within a single, cohesive framework.
2604.06900.paper_summary_zh: 網絡安全領域面臨兩個相互關聯的挑戰：全球合格從業人員的短缺以及持續存在的人為因素弱點，這些弱點佔據了大多數安全事件。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了SentinelSphere，一個由人工智能驅動的平台，將基於機器學習的威脅識別與由大型語言模型（LLM）提供的安全培訓統一起來。檢測模塊使用在CIC-IDS2017和CIC-DDoS2019基準數據集上訓練的增強深度神經網絡（DNN），並通過新穎的HTTP層特徵工程進行增強，以捕捉應用層攻擊簽名。對於教育組件，我們部署了一個量化的Phi-4模型變體（Q4_K_M），該模型針對網絡安全領域進行了微調，能夠在僅需16 GB RAM且不需要專用GPU資源的商用硬件上進行部署。實驗結果顯示，增強DNN在檢測準確性方面達到了高水平，同時相對於基線模型顯著降低了假陽性率，並在DDoS、暴力破解和基於網絡的漏洞等關鍵攻擊類別中保持了強大的召回率。涉及行業專業人士和大學生的驗證研討會確認，交通信號燈可視化系統和對話式AI助手對於沒有技術背景的用戶而言都是直觀且有效的。SentinelSphere說明了將智能威脅檢測與自適應的LLM驅動安全教育相結合，可以在單一的整合框架內有意義地解決技術和人為因素的網絡安全脆弱性。
2604.06900.author: Nikolaos D. Tantaroudas et.al.
2604.06900.authors: Nikolaos D. Tantaroudas, Ilias Karachalios, Andrew J. McCracken
